reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Google Business Profile
reauth_confirm.description: Your Google Business credentials need to be refreshed. Click the button below to re-authenticate.

api_access_pending.title: API access pending approval
api_access_pending.description:
The Google Business API quota is currently 0 — your access request has not been approved yet.

You can [request basic API access]({api_access_url}) if you haven't already.

Click **Submit** to add the integration now. It will activate automatically once Google approves your request — no need to re-authenticate.

abort.api_not_enabled: The **Google My Business API** (`mybusiness.googleapis.com`) is not enabled for your Google Cloud project. [Enable it here]({activation_url}), wait a minute for it to propagate, then try adding the integration again.
abort.no_locations: No Google Business locations were found for this account.
abort.cannot_fetch_locations: Failed to retrieve locations from Google. Check your API access and try again.
abort.already_configured: This Google Business location is already configured.

application_credentials.description:
To use Google Business Profile, you need OAuth 2.0 credentials from the [Google Cloud Console]({api_console_url}).

1. Create or select a project
2. Enable the **My Business API** and **Business Account Management API**
3. Create an **OAuth 2.0 Client ID** (Web application type)
4. Add `{redirect_url}` as an authorized redirect URI
5. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret below

create_post.name: Create post
create_post.description: Create a new post on your Google Business Profile.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The Google Business Profile config entry (location) to post to. Required when multiple locations are configured.

post_type.name: Post type
post_type.description: The type of post to create.

summary.name: Summary
summary.description: The main text body of the post.

language_code.name: Language code
language_code.description: BCP-47 language code for the post (e.g. 'en', 'de'). Defaults to 'en'.

call_to_action_type.name: Call-to-action type
call_to_action_type.description: The type of call-to-action button to include.

call_to_action_url.name: Call-to-action URL
call_to_action_url.description: The URL for the call-to-action button.

event_title.name: Event title
event_title.description: Title for event posts. Required when post type is 'event'.

redeem_online_url.name: Redeem online URL
redeem_online_url.description: URL where the offer can be redeemed online.

terms_conditions.name: Terms and conditions
terms_conditions.description: Terms and conditions text for offer posts.

update_post.name: Update post
update_post.description: Update an existing post on your Google Business Profile.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The Google Business Profile config entry (location) that owns this post.

post_name.name: Post name
post_name.description: The resource name of the post to update (e.g. 'accounts/123/locations/456/localPosts/789').

summary.name: Summary
summary.description: New text body for the post.

call_to_action_type.name: Call-to-action type
call_to_action_type.description: Updated call-to-action button type. Use 'none' to remove.

call_to_action_url.name: Call-to-action URL
call_to_action_url.description: Updated URL for the call-to-action button.

delete_post.name: Delete post
delete_post.description: Delete a post from your Google Business Profile.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry
config_entry_id.description: The Google Business Profile config entry (location) that owns this post.

post_name.name: Post name
post_name.description: The resource name of the post to delete (e.g. 'accounts/123/locations/456/localPosts/789').
